chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Reward of One Who Provides Iftar to a Fasting Person

text: 1954 - وَ رَوَى مُوسَى بْنُ بَكْرٍ عَنْ أَبِي اَلْحَسَنِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ: «تَفْطِيرُكَ أَخَاكَ اَلصَّائِمَ أَفْضَلُ مِنْ صِيَامِكَ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1954 - Musa ibn Bakr narrated from Abu al-Hasan (as) that he said:
"Providing iftar to your fasting brother is more virtuous than your own fasting."
